creator: stephen@missouri.edu
text:
Have you tried building it again?

One of the problems I found was that in the build of maxima, for some
reason the build process started eating up resources until the computer
was starved.  This could create random errors (e.g. a parallel build
might have one of its compiles break), and sometimes this error would
manifest itself in the most bizarre manner.  I have since applied a
band-aid fix to this problem.

If you could try building it again, and report back, I would really
appreciate it.
